summary: Documents registered in document-registry.jsonl must carry last_verified and stale_after_days fields. Without freshness metadata, 113 of 168 docs cannot be audited for staleness. Every new doc registered must include both fields. Existing critical docs (source_of_truth/current_status) should be backfilled.

Receipt documents must not claim 'Ruff clean' globally when pre-existing Ruff debt (excluded files) exists. Found 2 instances in agent-output-contract.md and verification-debt-policy.md. All future receipts must qualify Ruff claims with explicit scope.
